summary: Comprehensive testing of Settings page massive overhaul with nested multi-level settings. All requested sections tested and verified working: /settings route loads correctly, Password/Security/Personal Details panels open correctly, Security section with 2FA toggle/biometric login/FaceScan settings all display and work, back navigation functional, Privacy Controls and Notifications sections working.

issues: Labels use camelCase (e.g., 'privateAccount', 'activityStatus') instead of human-readable text - this is a minor UX inconsistency but functionality works

passed_tests: Settings page /settings route loads correctly after login
Settings main page displays user profile header with avatar, username, email
SETTINGS & PRIVACY section visible with Password, Security, Personal Details, Connected Features, Verification, Ad Preferences
TOOLS & RESOURCES section visible with Privacy Controls, Family Center, Default Audience
PREFERENCES section visible with Content Preferences, Notifications, Accessibility, Tab Bar, Media, etc.
Password section opens with currentPassword, newPassword, confirmPassword fields and changePassword button
Security section opens with twoFactorAuth enable2FA toggle
Security section shows biometricLogin faceIdFingerprint toggle
Security section shows loginActivity viewLoginHistory button
FaceScan Settings displays with scanQuality dropdown (Low/Medium/High/Ultra options)
FaceScan Settings shows scanSensitivity slider at 60%
FaceScan Settings shows multipleFaces toggle
FaceScan Settings shows aiEnhancement toggle (ON)
FaceScan Settings shows autoSnapshot toggle
FaceScan Settings shows showLandmarks toggle (ON)
FaceScan Settings shows hapticFeedback toggle (ON)
FaceScan Settings shows saveHistory toggle (ON)
Personal Details section opens with Display Name, Username, Email, Phone fields and saveChanges button
Privacy Controls section opens with accountPrivacy header
Privacy Controls shows privateAccount toggle
Privacy Controls shows activityStatus toggle
Privacy Controls shows readReceipts toggle
Notifications section opens with Allow All Notifications toggle
Notifications shows Messages category with tone, vibration, high priority, reactions toggles
Notifications shows Groups category with same sub-settings
Notifications shows Calls category with ringtone and vibration
Notifications shows Status category
Theme toggle (Dark/Light) works in Appearance section
Back navigation works - clicking arrow returns to main settings list
Accessibility section shows textSize slider, reduceMotion, highContrast toggles
Tab Bar section shows customizable Home, Chat, AI Assistant, Reels toggles
AI Settings section shows AI Assistant, Smart Suggestions, Quick Replies, AI Image Generation, Emotional Support Mode toggles and Clear AI History button
critical_code_review_comments: Settings.jsx is ~2005 lines - well-organized with separate section components (PasswordSection, SecuritySection, PersonalDetailsSection, etc.)
FaceScanSettings component (lines 869-1045) properly implements all required controls
Back navigation uses setActiveSection(null) to return to main settings - works correctly
All toggles use shadcn Switch components with proper state management via SettingsContext
SecuritySection correctly includes 2FA, Biometric, Login Activity, and FaceScan subsections
Notifications section uses comprehensive NotificationCategory component for Messages, Groups, Calls, Status
Theme selection uses data-testid attributes for testing (theme-dark, theme-light)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Settings page overhaul testing complete. All sections verified: Password, Security (with FaceScan subsettings), Personal Details, Privacy Controls, Notifications, Accessibility, Tab Bar, AI Settings, Theme selection. The Settings page uses camelCase labels for some items which could be improved but all functionality works correctly. FaceScan settings include quality dropdown (Low/Medium/High/Ultra), sensitivity slider (30-90%), and 6 toggle switches. Back navigation uses arrow button in header.
